title: Pressman's Software Engineering Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the core process framework and umbrella activities from Roger Pressman's software engineering approach as described in his seminal work.
elements: Process Framework (Communication, Planning, Modeling, Construction, Deployment)
Umbrella Activities (Project Tracking, Risk Management, Quality Assurance, Technical Reviews, Measurement)
Software Engineering Actions (Tasks, Work Products, Quality Points)
Adaptation Criteria (Project Size, Application Type, Team Maturity, Constraints)
relationships: The Process Framework forms the core workflow which is surrounded and supported by the ongoing Umbrella Activities. Software Engineering Actions are performed within this framework, and the entire process is adapted based on the Adaptation Criteria.
